body:
Hi Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to share a few updates on [NovaMind](novamind-ai)'s progress ahead of our next call. We've onboarded three new enterprise pilots since we last spoke, two of which are in the energy sector, which I know is squarely in your wheelhouse at [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital). Our inference costs have also come down another 18% month-over-month as we've continued optimizing the core pipeline, which has had a real impact on our unit economics story. I'd love to walk you through the updated deck and get your reaction to how we're thinking about the Series A structure. Would you have 30 minutes sometime later this week or early next?

Best,
Jordan
